title: Migration Pressures
subtitle: Borders swell. Compassion collides with capacity.

turns.prompt: Record numbers arrive at the border — fleeing conflict, drought, and economic collapse. Camps overflow within weeks.

choices.label: Open legal pathways and fast-track asylum

delayed.headline: Integration costs rise as arrivals settle in cities

choices.reaction: Humanitarian groups applaud. Housing markets tighten.

choices.label: Process claims offshore before entry
choices.flavour: Control the gate from a distance.
choices.reaction: Arrival numbers fall. Legal challenges mount.

choices.label: Invest in origin countries to reduce push factors
choices.reaction: Aid flows abroad. Results will take years.

turns.prompt: Newcomers fill labour shortages in farms and care homes. Tension rises in towns that feel bypassed.

choices.label: Fund language classes and housing for newcomers
choices.reaction: Classrooms fill. Waiting lists for social housing grow.

choices.label: Temporary work permits, no permanent settlement
choices.reaction: Employers get workers. Families live in limbo.

choices.label: Disperse arrivals across regions with incentives
choices.flavour: Spread the load — and the benefits.
choices.reaction: Some towns gain newcomers. Others lose patience — then lose funding.

turns.prompt: A viral video of overcrowded camps sparks outrage. Opposition demands harder borders.

choices.label: Fortify borders and increase patrols
choices.reaction: Crossings fall. Deaths in remote routes rise.

choices.label: Offer amnesty for long-settled undocumented residents
choices.reaction: Families breathe relief. Critics warn of new incentives.

choices.label: Switch to a strict skills-based points system
choices.reaction: Tech firms celebrate. Refugee advocates despair — then file another appeal.

turns.prompt: A neighbouring country closes its border, pushing thousands back toward you. Every policy has a human backlog.

memory_callbacks.text: Offshore centres you built are now dangerously overcrowded.
Communities that welcomed arrivals now demand relief you cannot quickly provide.
Aid you sent abroad has not slowed the crossings yet.

choices.label: Emergency shelter expansion at any cost
choices.flavour: House people in tents if you must.

choices.label: Close the border entirely until further notice
choices.flavour: Stop the flow, absorb the criticism.
choices.reaction: Queues freeze along the fence. Smugglers' phones light up with new routes.

choices.label: Demand international burden-sharing quotas
choices.reaction: Summits convene. Some partners agree — reluctantly.

turns.prompt: Final reckoning. What kind of society did you build for newcomers and neighbours?

choices.label: Commit to a permanently welcoming society
choices.reaction: Your streets sound different. Your schools sound exhausted.

choices.label: Enshrine strict, controlled immigration
choices.reaction: The queue looks orderly. The harvest rots anyway.

choices.label: Focus on regional cooperation over national walls
choices.reaction: Treaties replace fences. Sovereignty feels negotiated — in both languages.
